Built for hotels, hostels and serviced stays in Thailand

Scan passports in seconds and simplify your TM30 reporting workflow.

TM30 Flow helps your front desk capture guest passport details instantly at check-in, then export the daily Excel file for immigration. Less manual typing, fewer mistakes, and a faster routine for your team.

Book a demo See how it works
  • Speed up check-in and reduce repetitive typing
  • Make daily TM30 preparation easier for your staff
  • Reduce the risk of missed submissions and costly mistakes

Daily Excel ready for your immigration upload workflow
A simple workflow for your team

Designed for the way hotels and hostels in Thailand already operate.

No complicated setup. Staff scan the passport during check-in, then export the daily Excel file when it is time to submit on the immigration website.

1

Scan at check-in

Use the mobile app to scan the passport and capture the required guest details in seconds.

2

Export the daily file

Guest data is organized for you, so staff can download the Excel file without manual copy and paste.

3

Submit faster

Upload the Excel file to the immigration portal and complete the daily TM30 process with less friction.

See the product in action

See how your team can handle TM30 faster.

Show exactly how the app fits into your front desk routine: scan the passport at check-in, prepare the daily Excel file, and complete reporting with less manual work.
